message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The session covered two main areas:
   
   **A. Fix broken symlinks after folder rename**: The user renamed their project folder from `עיצוב חזית הדבקה על זכוכיות גוניור` to `ליו` but junction points in `.claude/skills/` still pointed to the old path, causing 52 false deletions in source control.
   
   **B. Build optimal Claude Code configuration**: User asked for maximum capability with minimum token burn, proper layer separation (global/project/template), session continuity via memory, MCP consolidation at global scope, permission rules for external connections, and auto-template-copy for new projects.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Windows junction points (ReparsePoints) for skill symlinks
   - Claude Code hook system: SessionStart, Stop, PostToolUse, PreToolUse, PreCompact
   - Hook exit codes: `exit 0` = no decision, `exit 2` = blocking error
   - Three-layer config architecture: Global (`~/.claude/`) → Project (`.claude/`) → Template
   - MCP (Model Context Protocol) scopes: user scope (`~/.claude.json`) vs project scope (`.mcp.json`)
   - Claude Code memory system: MEMORY.md index + per-topic files, first 200 lines loaded per session
   - `additionalDirectories` in settings.json for file access without auto-loading
   - `@rules/file.md` syntax for auto-loading rules files into CLAUDE.md
   - Session recorder pattern for cross-session continuity
   - Token efficiency: skills are free (only names listed), rules files cost tokens every session

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`c:\Users\yaniv\ליו\.claude\skills\shannon`** (junction point)
     - Was pointing to old folder name. Deleted and recreated:
     ```powershell
     New-Item -ItemType Junction -Path "C:\Users\yaniv\ליו\.claude\skills\shannon" -Target "C:\Users\yaniv\ליו\.agents\skills\shannon"
     New-Item -ItemType Junction -Path "C:\Users\yaniv\ליו\.claude\skills\valyu-best-practices" -Target "C:\Users\yaniv\ליו\.agents\skills\valyu-best-practices"
     ```

   - **`c:\Users\yaniv\ליו\.claude\settings.json`** (project settings)
     - Current hooks: SessionStart (Hebrew reminder), Stop (session recorder only), PostToolUse (npm run typecheck on Edit|Write), PreCompact (TODO reminder)
     - Removed: beep, ריוי, PreToolUse bash blocker (all moved to global)
     - Session recorder prompt writes to: `C:\Users\yaniv\.claude\projects\c--Users-yaniv-----------------------------------\memory\session-log.md`

   - **`C:\Users\yaniv\.claude\settings.json`** (global settings)
     - SessionStart: auto-copies template to new git projects lacking `.claude/settings.json`
     - Stop: Python tada.wav beep + ריוי code review agent
     - PreCompact: reminder about TODOs before compaction
     - PreToolUse: Bash destructive command blocker (`rm -rf|reset --hard|drop table` → `{"continue":false}`), Write file backup to `deletions/`, Bash rm backup to `deletions/`
     - PostToolUse: REMOVED (was causing blocking errors on JSON files; ריוי at Stop covers review)

   - **`c:\Users\yaniv\ליו\.claude\CLAUDE.md`** (project CLAUDE.md)
     - Trimmed from 82 lines to 18 lines, all placeholders removed
     - Current content: title, Non-Negotiables, note about on-demand rules, @rules/code-style.md, @rules/git-workflow.md
     - frontend.md, testing.md, performance.md, prompt-engineering.md available on demand (not auto-loaded)

   - **`C:\Users\yaniv\CLAUDE.md`** (global CLAUDE.md)
     - Added critical rule: `Never use external connections (browser/Playwright, GitHub API, web search, any MCP tool) without stating the intent and receiving explicit permission first.`

   - **`c:\Users\yaniv\ליו\.mcp.json`** (project MCP config)
     - Now contains ONLY GitHub (needs promptString for PAT):
     ```json
     {
       "inputs": [{"id": "github_pat", "type": "promptString", "description": "GitHub Personal Access Token", "password": true}],
       "servers": {
         "github": {"type": "stdio", "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-github"], "env": {"GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN": "${input:github_pat}"}}
       }
     }
     ```

   - **`C:\Users\yaniv\.claude.json`** (global Claude config)
     - Added playwright and context7 at user scope via CLI:
     ```powershell
     claude mcp add -s user context7 -- npx -y @upstash/context7-mcp@latest
     claude mcp add -s user playwright -- npx -y @playwright/mcp@latest --output-dir .playwright-mcp --storage-state .playwright-mcp/session.json --save-storage-state .playwright-mcp/session.json
     ```

   - **`C:\Users\yaniv\.claude\templates\project\.claude\settings.json`** (template)
     - Complete with: SessionStart (Hebrew reminder), Stop (session recorder to local `.claude/session-log.md`), PostToolUse (npm typecheck), PreCompact (reminder)
     - No beep, no ריוי (those are global)

   - **`C:\Users\yaniv\.claude\templates\project\.mcp.json`** (template MCP)
     - GitHub only (playwright + context7 now global)

   - **`C:\Users\yaniv\.claude\templates\project\.gitignore`** (template gitignore)
     - Added: `deletions/` and `.claude/session-log.md`

   - **`c:\Users\yaniv\ליו\.gitignore`** (project gitignore)
     - Added: `deletions/`

   - **`C:\Users\yaniv\.claude\projects\c--Users-yaniv-----------------------------------\memory\MEMORY.md`**
     - Added entry: `[session-log.md](session-log.md) — יומן סשנים: מה נעשה/הוחלט בכל שיחה, לרציפות בין sessions`
     - `session-log.md` does not yet exist (will be created by Stop hook at first session end)

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **52 false deletions in source control**: Caused by broken junction points after folder rename. Fixed by deleting and recreating junctions pointing to correct `ליו` path.
   
   - **settings.json additionalDirectories had old folder name**: `c:\\Users\\yaniv\\עיצוב חזית הדבקה על זכוכיות גוניור\\rules` updated to `c:\\Users\\yaniv\\ליו\\rules`.
   
   - **PostToolUse agent causing "blocking error" on JSON files**: Global PostToolUse code reviewer agent ran on every Edit/Write including JSON/config files. Tried pre-check command with `exit 1` (wrong exit code), then `exit 2`. Research found `exit 2` = blocking error but it surfaces as noisy error messages to user. Final fix: removed entire global PostToolUse section since ריוי at Stop already covers code review.
   
   - **`deletions/` folder appearing as untracked in git**: Global PreToolUse backup hook creates `deletions/` in every project. Fixed by adding `deletions/` to both project `.gitignore` and template `.gitignore`.
   
   - **PreCompact missing from global settings**: Was in project and template but not global. Added to global settings.
   
   - **Stop hook reporting "plan not completed"**: Session recorder correctly identified that the 3-layer reorganization was planned but not executed. Led to implementing the full reorganization in the next session turn.

5. Problem Solving:
   - **Token efficiency**: Identified that CLAUDE.md + @rules files burn tokens every session while skills are free. Solution: trim CLAUDE.md, move reference rules to on-demand, keep only always-needed rules auto-loaded.
   - **Session continuity**: Built session recorder hook that writes to memory after each session, capturing what happened even when no code changed.
   - **New project setup**: Built auto-copy hook + template system so new git projects automatically get all hooks configured.
   - **MCP management**: Research revealed personal MCPs should be at user scope (`~/.claude.json`). Moved playwright and context7 globally; kept GitHub per-project (needs PAT via promptString).
   - **Hook deduplication**: Identified that ריוי, beep, and destructive command blocker belonged in global settings, not duplicated per-project.

6. All user messages:
   - "רציתי לשנות את שם התקיה הראשית ב אקפלורר של אנטיגרבתי... תבדוק שהכל בסדר שלא נשבר איזה קישור כי הסורס קונטרול מראה 52 אירועים ומבקש לאשר קומיט"
   - "כן" (approve commit)
   - "ללחוץ סינק?" (push to remote)
   - "איך יוצרים מצב מקסימלי שבו יש לך גישה לכל הסקילס, יש לך רולס חשובים, אתה ממשיך להתעדכן ולחקור כמו שביקשתי לשינויים ויחד עם זאת נשאר תוכנה רזה ולא שורפת טוקנים ללא השפעה על רמת הגישה להכל"
   - "לא לא לכל שיחה אמרנו ביום שבת יתבצע מחקר מעמיק" (session continuity = Saturday cron, not per-session)
   - "תסביר לי את זה ואני לא הבנתי עדיין את כל המשמעות"
   - "לא ביקשתי גם את זה שיהיה? שמירת רציפות — לוגיקה שמכניסה ל-memory את השינויים החשובים אחרי כל session"
   - [Stop hook feedback shown] - ריוי reported plan not completed
   - "מאשר" (approve implementing session recorder)
   - [Stop hook feedback about session recorder not writing because no code changed]
   - "כן" (approve implementing it now)
   - [Stop hook feedback - plan discussed but not executed]
   - "תקרה מה שרשמת מקודם תחת הגדרת מקסימום עם רזון עם עושים את זה וזה לא פוגע בכלל באבטחה או אתה לא תשכח פתאום דברים אז תעשה"
   - [Stop hook feedback - hooks still duplicated, plan not executed]
   - "מה אתה חושב שהכי נכון תסביר לי" (asking for recommendation on global vs project hooks)
   - [Stop hook feedback - plan discussed not implemented again]
   - "כן" (proceed with 3-layer architecture)
   - "שאלה מה היא הדרך המושלמת ליצור את התהליכים של אבטחה, חוקים, סוכנים, זיכרון לקבל מקסימום אבל להתנהל נכון וגם נגיד יש לי עכשיו עוד משימה פשוט להמשיך לאותו צ'ט או לפתוח תיקיה חדשה ואם כן איפה"

   - "יופי עכשיו תן לי פירוט של כל הסקילים והחוקים שיכולים להיאבד תסביר איך מתחילים פרוייקט חדש ואתה עם יכולות כמו שאפשרתי לך להיכנס לווב או להתחבר עם API"
   - "אתה לא יכול ליצור תיקיה להרשאות כאלה ובפרוייקט חדש יהיה חוק שאם אתה צריך גישה לחיבור אתה תבקש הרשאה? ואז לא אצטרך כל פעם להגדיר אותם מחדש"

   - "מאשר" (approve internet access for research)

   - "תעביר אותם ואחכ שוב תבדוק שהכל עובד והכל תקין עד לסיום התהליך הזה אני מאשר לך כל דבר שאתה צריך לעשות בנושא. במידה וחקרת והבנת שיש דברים נוספים לשינוי עשה אותם"

addedBlocks:
## claude.ai Microsoft Learn
# Microsoft Learn MCP Server

This server gives structured access to official Microsoft and Azure documentation via three tools:

## Tools

### microsoft_docs_search
Search official documentation and return up to 10 concise, high-quality content chunks (max 500 tokens each), including title, URL, and excerpt.

- Use first to get a quick, reliable overview
- Ideal for grounding answers in Microsoft knowledge

### microsoft_code_sample_search
Search for code snippets and examples in official Microsoft Learn documentation and return up to 20 relevant, high-quality code samples.

- Use when you need to provide sample Microsoft/Azure related code in your answers.  
- Ideal for generating code snippets or practical implementation examples.  
- Optional parameter `language` can filter results. 

### microsoft_docs_fetch
Fetch and convert full Microsoft documentation pages to markdown.

- Use after search when you need full content from a specific URL
- Required for detailed tutorials, troubleshooting, prerequisites, code samples, or when search results are incomplete or outdated

## Workflow

1. Use `microsoft_docs_search` to find relevant documents.
2. If you need code examples or practical snippets, use `microsoft_code_sample_search`.
3. If deeper or complete information is needed, use `microsoft_docs_fetch`.

**Search gives breadth. Code Sample Search gives practical examples. Fetch gives depth.**

All content comes from Microsoft Learn or official sources, returned in clean markdown format.
